channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Affluent White Female Liberals Are Living In A Made-Up World
item.description: The Land of Make Believe will eventually come to an end, and sobriety and rationality will be restored. Let’s pray the correction doesn’t come in the ...

item.title: The Greatest Sports Story Ever Told
item.description: Netflix has released a new documentary, Miracle: The Boys of ’80 .

item.title: Fear Porn About AI Dominance Follows The Covid Tyrants’ Playbook
item.description: I don't know what the future of AI holds. But neither do any of the people using panic rhetoric to induce population-wide fear and dread.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg Faces the Tough Questions He Deserves
item.description: As Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg testifies in a landmark case, it’s time for Congress to stand up for children’s safety online.

item.title: Lessons from Excalibur
item.description: John Boorman’s restored masterpiece salvages the era of bad movies.

item.title: The Spy Is Always in the Worst Possible Place
item.description: Twenty-five years after Robert Hanssen’s capture, espionage has found a new home.

item.title: The SAVE Act’s Virtuous Goals Are Not Worth the Cost
item.description: We shouldn’t further federalize elections, much less nuke the filibuster, to address a problem of marginal scale that states can address on their own.

item.title: France’s Plan To Lure Women Into Freezing Their Eggs Won’t Fix Its Flailing Fertility Rate
item.description: Taxpayer-funded reproductive technology gives people a false sense of security about their decisions to delay marriage and children.

item.title: While Democrats’ Anti-ICE Fury Escalates, Americans Show They Want Immigration Laws Enforced
item.description: As protests and riots against ICE grow more common, formal state and local cooperation with ICE grows far more common.

item.title: The Violence From Trans iPad Kids Is About To Get A Lot Worse
item.description: Maybe you’ve got strict screen guardrails at home, but do you want your kid in the same room, or even the same building, as the iPad kid every day for...

item.title: White House names new pick for Nevada top federal prosecutor after confirmation trouble
item.description: The Trump administration has selected a new candidate for Nevada's top federal prosecutor after challenges to its first pick's eligibility, marking an...

item.title: Top Democratic fundraisers sought Jeffrey Epstein's support despite child sex offender conviction
item.description: Jeffrey Epstein was registered as a high-risk sex offender, but it did not matter to the fundraisers working for Democratic leaders Sen. Charles E. Sc...

item.title: Judge blocks deportation of Palestinian activist who led protests at Columbia
item.description: An immigration judge has blocked the Trump administration from deporting Mohsen Mahdawi, a Palestinian graduate student who led protests at Columbia U...

item.title: New Mexico legislators launch 'truth commission' investigation into Jeffrey Epstein's secluded ranch
item.description: State legislators in New Mexico launched an investigation Tuesday into past activity at a secluded desert ranch where financier and sex offender Jeffr...

item.title: J.D. Vance sticks to job at hand -- winning midterms, immigration, Iran -- when pressed about 2028
item.description: Vice President J.D. Vance on Tuesday dodged questions about his ambition to become the GOP presidential nominee in 2028, saying there is still a lot t...
